exchange_private_config_funnel_title: Welcome to your Private Exchange area
exchange_private_config_funnel_message_t: We are pleased to announce that your Private Exchange product has been delivered.
exchange_private_config_funnel_message_d: To use it, start configuring it now!
exchange_private_config_funnel_label_sub: To avoid any conflict with other services already on your domain (website, API, etc.), access to webmail must be configured on a dedicated subdomain (e.g. mail.domain.com).
exchange_private_config_funnel_warning_p: Using an IDN domain in an email program (Outlook, macOS Mail, etc.) is not recommended and can cause incompatibilities.
exchange_private_config_funnel_info_ovhd: Since your domain is hosted with OVHcloud, we will automatically configure your service. This configuration will take several minutes.
exchange_private_config_funnel_info_no_o: You must ensure that the DNS zone of the chosen domain can be modified by its administrator.
exchange_private_config_funnel_modal_tit: Are you sure you want to continue?
exchange_private_config_funnel_modal_des: By confirming, you accept that your email server address is https://{{subdomain}}.{{domain}}.
exchange_private_config_funnel_modal_war: You will not be able to change this information later.
exchange_private_config_funnel_configura: This may take a few minutes...
Once this step is complete, simply add the CNAME record to {{ hostname }} to confirm that you are the domain owner.
You can safely leave this page; the process will continue in the background.
To confirm that you are the administrator of the domain {{ hostname }}, please add this DNS record.
Once you have added the CNAME record, it may take up to 1 hour to load.

You can safely leave this page; the process will continue in the background. You will then be sent an email confirming that the service has been enabled, and that the encryption certificates have been generated.
You have 48 hours to add the CNAME record. Once this time period has passed, you will need to restart the configuration process from the beginning.
